paper_title: NExtLong: Toward Effective Long-Context Training without Long Documents
failure_detail: Code has dependencies (, accelerate, concurrent, datasets, distutils, fcntl, flash_attn, gc, gradio, huggingface_hub (+24 more)) but no requirements file; env-like files found at unexpected paths: LongMagpie/requirements.txt, NExtLong/requirements.txt, LongBench-Pro/requirements.txt, LiteLong/requirements.txt, EntropyLong/prolong/requirements_pip_train.txt
